---

## Description
Describe the feature or improvement

## Justification
Why would this be useful?

## Suggested Implementation
If you have ideas, describe them

## Stack Number
Stack #XX (if related to specific lesson)

## Checklist
- [ ] I searched for similar feature requests
- [ ] This is not a duplicate request
